videos.headline: Branson Robinson powers Georgia to early lead
videos.description: Branson Robinson powers in a five-yard rushing touchdown to give Georgia the lead vs. Mississippi State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Branson Robinson powers Georgia to early lead) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kelly Akharaiyi makes the catch for a Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Michael Van Buren Jr. finds Kelly Akharaiyi to get Mississippi State back in the game vs. Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kelly Akharaiyi makes the catch for a Mississippi State TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck airs one out for Georgia TD
videos.description: Carson Beck makes the pass to Dillon Bell to extend Georgia's lead vs. Mississippi State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck airs one out for Georgia TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck throws dime to Arian Smith for Georgia TD
videos.description: Carson Beck connects with Arian Smith to put Georgia in control vs. Mississippi State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck throws dime to Arian Smith for Georgia TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Johnnie Daniels runs in Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Johnnie Daniels breaks off for a 19-yard Mississippi State touchdown vs. Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Johnnie Daniels runs in Mississippi State TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Davon Booth makes the catch for a Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Michael Van Buren Jr. finds Davon Booth open to reduce Mississippi State's deficit vs. Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Davon Booth makes the catch for a Mississippi State TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
